title: Best House 7 Inch White Plastic Plates Reusable Heavy Duty Lunch & Dinner Plate for Parties Weddings & Events (Pack of 20)
features: This Reusable plastic plate is made of food-grade PP material, is BPA-free, and has no peculiar smell. It is thick and durable, rugged, and not easy to break.
Great reusable alternative to wasteful disposable dinnerware; use again and again
LIGHTWEIGHT & UNBREAKABLE: These Dinner Plates are lightweight and unbreakable, easy to carry, and no need to worry about breaking after falling.
GREAT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: For garden parties, luncheon, birthday parties, baby showers, special occasions, or even home use.
PACKAGE INCLUDES: 20 Pcs X Reusable Round Paper Plates 7"
